PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Off Calendar

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Continued To Nov-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Adam Lazar for Youlanda Williams.

Mr. Lazar stated that this matter is considered subsequent of the order approved on 5/14/15 in department 302, cited 3600(a)(2) and that it applies when the court approves a compromise, stated that the examiner cited 3604 but 3611 is dispositive, that San Francisco divides the compromise and special needs petition pursuant to an advisory committee otherwise the matter would still be in department 302. The Court asked if we have any authority for the special needs trust and why it would not be handled where the trust is being administered. Mr. Lazar stated that the trust is not established yet and cited 7.903. The petition regarding a substituted judgment trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
